481e-85c9-bda40f2f6b43","00291098-2ca4-4ff3-8ca6-a007eb96979b","dc47a23e-3700-49f3-8ce0-973ec91dba79","ac927c1d-1dca-4e90-8949-847237874b49","2efddbd7-dbe0-4179-9132-44ee6c4552eb","d198c19b-19a3-46ce-83d5-b984e3b02261","4e168c31-9e9d-4343-9530-c352a7229346","20f6e661-8663-4188-a123-4145bb45277e","b4791770-0ee0-455f-b2df-8d1b7f1759be","9e5bddbf-7fb9-4189-afbd-47c884f84e1f","c54cb3ba-7131-4c4d-a260-1ac457f8bdf4","1818ec96-9242-48ac-abb6-96e5538a230e","1e28d953-c6af-4b7f-9820-898b0393e74d","35afdfad-905d-4519-abf6-437aa16d211b","7f11163a-042d-423a-a2a3-a26632869e69","4d62b8e9-69af-4a57-ad0a-3651e527f054","6195c52d-4aa2-4a49-af1a-9f3a597c6b91","2998cff0-62f0-4678-99ce-5715bb306672","dd525ba7-623a-4c4b-aa9b-2c0028ea5fc1","d0bbd45f-11cb-4455-8bbd-f06fd994f637","3af92541-3061-4d20-9272-ec7f2d4ee992","1d300f02-d62c-497f-a830-a402fddf1300","223c0cc3-d069-45bb-82ff-4dc28623ce0e","35391671-fe27-43f8-803b-01cad88ff2ce","1f72883c-fa01-424d-9f37-1f2679389d27","7e4608cb-6124-4d73-b022-71f49c19a401","e9a03347-cf95-40cc-aa27-30303c2c9567","eacb9dcf-2e04-41f7-9038-9ee9bf66de06","fb12656e-e88e-4c60-9f0c-a1a3e494768f","68a25e63-7ab3-4dd5-92c9-82179f208235","d1de18c2-6f49-4dfb-b18e-d914df7d34ab","715e27a3-64cb-4ec9-9047-87e002316c84","efbcd35c-4f5f-47fd-963b-6547a2bc0d76","f5fcfca3-4826-4706-99b5-8d6f227eb017","4188eb49-f5ac-4cd6-ae6a-2df7a1126eae","56da22d2-7f0d-4973-9b4d-e749a541277b","6e0a2b4b-4e39-4e52-890c-78de8021fbdf","b0e25f82-4478-44d1-a47d-c194c222d8b9","4e638a89-c6b8-4db5-9b85-10f30843e81e","183734ee-5970-425d-8d19-46af51b0c9ec","fcfe1dc2-ec76-46e6-b9ad-9e420a64f8f1","938881b1-6a5d-4712-a8fd-a79a3bf151e7","fd476308-933c-488d-a478-cc1a61b2edf5","d9ed0cd8-f167-4231-bc2b-e979bbd05897","0b3b20f8-547d-4bdb-913a-46f9b17a2217","4e5d17d1-61f5-4178-9371-0c88e3ac1de8","d4ebb90d-66b4-4ef4-a0c2-5ab5d5459a7a","040cfd5b-83fd-46bd-bf92-fa667992c075","1f73ea1e-330f-4ce4-b337-4df018f2484e","b33ade5f-24e1-4a91-b121-e48bf2721462","fc4a2482-1319-430f-a516-adbfd91b43ad","c54c8123-9937-4362-b718-ed7f76198d01"],"filename":"2025 Tax Return Documents (SMITH TALIA S and Antonio Smith).pdf"}]}}

data: {"type":"text-start","id":"text-d79b410d-3426-4bf6-a1ec-73b44980ac52"}

data: {"type":"text-delta","id":"text-d79b410d-3426-4bf6-a1ec-73b44980ac52","delta":"1. For the document \"2025 Tax Return Documents (Whittaker Jordan).pdf,\" the taxpayer name shown is Jordan Whittaker [S1].\n\n2. For the document \"2025 Tax Return Documents (SMITH TALIA S and Antonio Smith).pdf,\" the taxpayer names shown are TALIA S SMITH & Antonio Smith [S2].\n\n3.
